self_improvement.claim: Directive Workspace can improve future Engine self-improvement quality by keeping the staged planning path under permanent focused verification.
self_improvement.mechanism: This DEEP Architecture case materializes one focused verification slice instead of relying on ad hoc inspection of the ts-edge DEEP refactor.
self_improvement.baseline_observation: Before this DEEP opener, the progressive staged Engine path existed in code but had no permanent dedicated repo check.
self_improvement.expected_effect: Future regressions in the staged planning path will fail quickly through one focused repo check.

decision.rationale: The current Engine shape justifies one bounded verification slice for the progressive staged path.
decision.runtime_threshold_check: yes - the mechanism is still valuable without a runtime surface, so Architecture should retain product-owned value
